title: Horse Armour Recipe
description: Now you can craft your own horse armour
body:
🐴 Horse Armour Recipe Datapack  
Equip your steed in style—no dungeon crawling required!  
This datapack introduces custom crafting recipes for Horse Armour, letting players forge protection for their mounts using accessible materials.

✨ Features  
✅ Shaped recipes for:  
- **Copper Horse Armour**
- **Iron Horse Armour**
- **Gold Horse Armour**
- **Diamond Horse Armour**
- **Netherite Horse Armour**
✅ Balanced integration with vanilla progression and exploration  
🧩 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21+
